---
format:
  pdf:
    papersize: a4
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    geometry:
      - paperwidth=110cm
      - paperheight=70cm
      - margin=20mm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \pagestyle{empty}
        \thispagestyle{empty}
mermaid:
  theme: neutral
---

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {"theme":"neutral", "er": {"diagramPadding": 60, "entityPadding": 18, "useMaxWidth": false}}}%%
erDiagram
    ClinicalTrial      ||--o{ TrialSite       : "runs at"
    HospitalSite       ||--o{ TrialSite       : "hosts"
    ClinicalTrial      ||--o{ ConsentVersion  : "has versions"
    Participant        ||--o{ Enrollment      : "enrols via"
    TrialSite          ||--o{ Enrollment      : "place of"
    InactivationReason ||--o{ Enrollment      : "explains exit"
    Enrollment         ||--o{ ConsentSigning  : "consented by"
    ConsentVersion     ||--o{ ConsentSigning  : "signed in"

    ClinicalTrial {
        int trial_id PK
        varchar registration_number UK
        nvarchar trial_name
        varchar phase
        varchar status
        date start_date
        date end_date
    }
    HospitalSite {
        int site_id PK
        varchar site_code UK
        nvarchar site_name
        nvarchar city
        nvarchar country
    }
    Participant {
        int participant_id PK
        varchar study_code UK
        date date_of_birth
        varchar sex_at_birth
        date registration_date
    }
    InactivationReason {
        int reason_id PK
        varchar reason_code UK
        nvarchar reason_description
    }
    TrialSite {
        int trial_id "PK, FK"
        int site_id "PK, FK"
        date opened_date
        date closed_date
    }
    ConsentVersion {
        int consent_version_id PK
        int trial_id FK
        int version_number
        date effective_from
        nvarchar wording_text
    }
    Enrollment {
        int enrollment_id PK
        int participant_id FK
        int trial_id FK
        int site_id FK
        date enrolment_date
        date inactivation_date
        int inactivation_reason_id FK
    }
    ConsentSigning {
        int consent_signing_id PK
        int enrollment_id FK
        int consent_version_id FK
        date signed_date
        nvarchar witnessed_by
    }
```
